<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watertier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ãng-ÃŽng]][[de:Wasser-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre d'eau]][[hak:NgÃŽm-yÃŽm]][[ja:åĢŽåŊ]][[ko:ėėļ]][[vi:NhÃĒm Dáš§n]][[za:Nyaemzyinz]][[zh-min-nan:JÃŪm-ÃŪn]][[zh-yue:åĢŽåŊ]][[zh:åĢŽåŊ]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watertier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ãng-ÃŽng]][[de:Wasser-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre d'eau]][[hak:NgÃŽm-yÃŽm]][[ja:åĢŽåŊ]][[ko:ėėļ]][[vi:NhÃĒm Dáš§n]][[za:Nyaemzyinz]][[zh-min-nan:JÃŪm-ÃŪn]][[zh-yue:åĢŽåŊ]][[zh:åĢŽåŊ]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watertier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ãng-ÃŽng]][[de:Wasser-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre d'eau]][[hak:NgÃŽm-yÃŽm]][[ja:åĢŽåŊ]][[ko:ėėļ]][[vi:NhÃĒm Dáš§n]][[za:Nyaemzyinz]][[zh-min-nan:JÃŪm-ÃŪn]][[zh-yue:åĢŽåŊ]][[zh:åĢŽåŊ]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Tiger|kanji=åĢŽåŊ|romaji=mizunoe tora|onyomi=jinâin|p=rÃĐnyÃ­n|w=jen-yin|mi=ĘÉnÂģâĩ ČĩinÂēÂđ|y=jam4 jan4|j=jam4 jan4|ci=jÉm jÉn|mc=ÉēiÉŠm in|oc-bs=ÉēÉĻm in|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Water Tiger also known as  Yang Water Tiger''' (åĢŽåŊ, ãŋããŪããĻãããããããŪãĻãããããã) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 39th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Xin Chou|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|čūäļ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Gui Mao|ja|1=Yin Water Rabbit|2=ja|įļåŊ|1=Yin Water Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|é°é―äščĄææģ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}'s {{ill|Ren|ja|åĢŽ|1=Mizunoe (åĢŽ)|lt=Mizunoe (åĢŽ)|2=ja|3=åĢŽ|4=zh|5=åĢŽ|1=Mizunoe (åĢŽ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (åĢŽ)|qq=}} represents yang water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}'s {{ill|Tiger|ja|åŊ|1=yÃ­n|lt=Tiger (åŊ)|2=ja|3=åŊ|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (åŊ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang wood, forming a mutual generation (water generates wood) according to the principles of the Five Elements.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Tiger (åĢŽåŊ)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rÃĐnyÃ­n
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: jin'in
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): im-in (ėėļ)
** Vietnamese (HÃĄn-Viáŧt): NhÃĒm Dáš§n

<!--
==
* Yang Water Tiger (åĢŽåŊ) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rÃĐnyÃ­n
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: ãŋããŪããĻã (mizunoe-tora)
***Onyomi: ããããŪãĻã (jinka-no-tora)
***Onyomi: ãããã (jinin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): imin
** Vietnamese (HÃĄn-Viáŧt): NhÃĒm Dáš§n

-->
==Years of Yang Water Tiger==
A {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year that leaves a remainder of 42 when divided by 60 is considered a Yang Water Tiger {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Water Tiger Year'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 42|en|AD 42|WD=Q23694|lt=42 AD|1=AD 42}}
* {{ill|AD 102|en|AD 102|WD=Q23869|lt=102 AD|1=AD 102}}
* {{ill|162|en|162|WD=Q29987|lt=162 AD|1=162}}
* {{ill|222|en|222|WD=Q24783|lt=222 AD|1=222}}
* {{ill|282|en|282|WD=Q31842|lt=282 AD|1=282}}
* {{ill|342|en|342|WD=Q34539|lt=342 AD|1=342}}
* {{ill|402|en|402|WD=Q30512|lt=402 AD|1=402}}
* {{ill|462|en|462|WD=Q30497|lt=462 AD|1=462}}
* {{ill|522|en|522|WD=Q32903|lt=522 AD|1=522}}
* {{ill|582|en|582|WD=Q32212|lt=582 AD|1=582}}
* {{ill|642|en|642|WD=Q30872|lt=642 AD|1=642}}
* {{ill|702|en|702|WD=Q23497|lt=702 AD|1=702}}
* {{ill|762|en|762|WD=Q30324|lt=762 AD|1=762}}
* {{ill|822|en|822|WD=Q29928|lt=822 AD|1=822}}
* {{ill|882|en|882|WD=Q23824|lt=882 AD|1=882}}
* {{ill|942|en|942|WD=Q23740|lt=942 AD|1=942}}
|
* {{ill|1002|en|1002|WD=Q19223|lt=1002 AD|1=1002}}
* {{ill|1062|en|1062|WD=Q19396|lt=1062 AD|1=1062}}
* {{ill|1122|en|1122|WD=Q23417|lt=1122 AD|1=1122}}
* {{ill|1182|en|1182|WD=Q19708|lt=1182 AD|1=1182}}
* {{ill|1242|en|1242|WD=Q5437|lt=1242 AD|1=1242}}
* {{ill|1302|en|1302|WD=Q5612|lt=1302 AD|1=1302}}
* {{ill|1362|en|1362|WD=Q6166|lt=1362 AD|1=1362}}
* {{ill|1422|en|1422|WD=Q6262|lt=1422 AD|1=1422}}
* {{ill|1482|en|1482|WD=Q6633|lt=1482 AD|1=1482}}
* {{ill|1542|en|1542|WD=Q6520|lt=1542 AD|1=1542}}
* {{ill|1602|en|1602|WD=Q6727|lt=1602 AD|1=1602}}
* {{ill|1662|en|1662|WD=Q7574|lt=1662 AD|1=1662}}
* {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722 AD|1=1722}}
* {{ill|1782|en|1782|WD=Q7740|lt=1782 AD|1=1782}}
* {{ill|1842|en|1842|WD=Q7625|lt=1842 AD|1=1842}}
* {{ill|1902|en|1902|WD=Q2043|lt=1902 AD|1=1902}}
* {{ill|1962|en|1962|WD=Q2764|lt=1962 AD|1=1962}}
|
* {{ill|2022|en|2022|WD=Q49625|lt=2022 AD|1=2022}}
* {{ill|2082 AD|ja|2080åđīäŧĢ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2082 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2142 AD|ja|22äļįī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2142 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11177|1=22nd century}}
* {{ill|2202 AD|ja|23äļįī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2202 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q49832|1=23rd century}}
* {{ill|2262 AD|ja|23äļįī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2262 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q49832|1=23rd century}}
* {{ill|2322 AD|ja|2322åđī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2322 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2382 AD|ja|2382åđī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2382 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2442 AD|ja|2442åđī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2442 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2502 AD|ja|2502åđī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2502 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2562 AD|ja|2562åđī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2562 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2622 AD|ja|2622åđī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2622 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2682 AD|ja|2682åđī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2682 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2742 AD|ja|2742åđī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2742 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2802 AD|ja|2802åđī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2802 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2862 AD|ja|2862åđī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2862 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2922 AD|ja|2922åđī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2922 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2982 AD|ja|2982åđī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2982 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yang Water Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 2 or 7 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Ren|ja|åĢŽ|1=Mizunoe (åĢŽ)|lt=Mizunoe (åĢŽ)|2=ja|3=åĢŽ|4=zh|5=åĢŽ|1=Mizunoe (åĢŽ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (åĢŽ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|äļ|1=Hinoto (äļ)|lt=Hinoto (äļ)|2=ja|3=äļ|4=zh|5=äļ|1=Hinoto (äļ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (äļ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January|1=January}} is considered the Yang Water Tiger {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} to the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}).

==Days of Yang Water Tiger==
=== Selected Day ===
The Yang Water Tiger day is the 10th day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|åĪĐäļåĪĐäļ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=åĪĐäļįĨ|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=åĪĐäļįĨ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Keng-chÃĄ]]
[[zh-yue:åšå]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Water Tiger|qq=ja|åĢŽåŊ|version=98658013|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:KÃĄng-cáđģĖde]]
[[nds:Feuer-Pferdevi]]
[[de:Yang Water Tiger]]

[[ja:åĢŽåŊ]]
[[zh:åĢŽåŊ]]
[[ko:ėėļ]]
[[fr:Tigre de eau]]
[[de:Wasser-Tiger]]

[[af:Vuurperd (astrologie)]]
[[de:Feuer-Pferdeen]]
[[en:Fire Horse]]
[[fr:Cheval de feushak]]
[[it:Kang-cháđģĖid]]

[[ko:ęē―ėĪ]]
[[vi:BÃŽnh Ngáŧ]]
[[za:Gengceij]]
[[zh:åšå]]
[[ar:Yang Water Tiger]]

<!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--><!--Yang Water Tiger--><!--Yang Water Tiger-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Watertier (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Ãng-ÃŽng]]
[[fr:Tigre d'eau]]
[[hak:NgÃŽm-yÃŽm]]
[[vi:NhÃĒm Dáš§n]]
[[za:Nyaemzyinz]]
[[zh-min-nan:JÃŪm-ÃŪn]]
[[zh-yue:åĢŽåŊ]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Watertier (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Ãng-ÃŽng]]
[[fr:Tigre d'eau]]
[[hak:NgÃŽm-yÃŽm]]
[[vi:NhÃĒm Dáš§n]]
[[za:Nyaemzyinz]]
[[zh-min-nan:JÃŪm-ÃŪn]]
[[zh-yue:åĢŽåŊ]]
{{wikidata link|Q1062922}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
